response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack experience, the candidate lacks direct exposure to C++ or Rust in commercial routing, geospatial, or navigation systems — critical for this role. Their work with DLang and Node.js in GIS projects is relevant but insufficient to meet the core requirement of building high-performance routing tile pipelines with modern C++ and distributed systems expertise. No evidence of fault tolerance, consistency models, or real-time traffic integration in production navigation systems.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions in geospatial platforms (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and deliver complex systems
Experience with low-latency systems and performance optimization using async I/O
concerns: No demonstrated commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or navigation domains
Lack of evidence in distributed systems concepts like consistency, service discovery, or fault tolerance
Primary tools (DLang, Node.js) are not aligned with the role’s core tech stack (C++/Linux/routing tiles)
